name: Bronze Starter Loop
steps: mine copper/tin;smelt bronze;smith bronze spear;fight rats/cave bugs
purpose: First complete gathering to combat loop.

name: Ranged Bow Loop
steps: cut logs;craft bow stave;get spider silk;make bowstring;mine ore;smith arrowheads;craft arrows;train ranged
purpose: Makes ranged depend on materials and monsters.

name: Swamp Access Loop
steps: catch bog eel;farm/loot swamp herb;cook bog eel stew;craft goblin charm;enter swamp shrine path

name: Bridge Shortcut Loop
steps: cut oak;make planks;mine iron;smith nails;defeat bridge bandit;repair west bridge

name: Minecart Unlock Loop
steps: mine iron/coal;smith brackets;craft wheels;fight cave goblin miner;repair minecart

name: Rival Camp Loop
steps: smith steel gear;cook pike/carp;craft charm;fight scouts;collect map scraps;unlock rival gate
purpose: Mid-game combat preparation and hostile camp access.

name: Troll Ridge Loop
steps: craft warm/tough gear;brew defence potion;repair mountain pass;fight troll whelps;mine deep ore

name: Town Upgrade Loop
steps: gather planks;smith braces;loot station parts;upgrade bank/furnace/anvil/range
purpose: Creates item sinks and permanent account/world progression.
